name: Lomo Saltado
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Sirloin Steak, cut into thin strips
4 medium Potatoes, cut into french fries
2 tablespoons Rocoto (Peruvian Red Hot Pepper) or any hot pepper you can get
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the french fries in a separate pan and set aside.
2. Season the steak strips with salt and pepper.
3. Heat oil in a pan and sauté garlic until fragrant.
4. Add steak strips to the pan, followed by rocoto (hot pepper). Cook until browned, stirring occasionally.
5. When the steak strips are cooked through, add onions, green pepper, tomato, and oregano. Stir to combine.
6. Cover the pan and sauté for approximately 5-7 minutes, ensuring vegetables are not overcooked but still tender.
7. Add the french fries back into the pan and stir to coat everything evenly.
8. Serve the Lomo Saltado over white rice and enjoy.
